_meta.scope: deployed-20, web-validatable (validated+doable), one export per factor
_meta.status_legend: pending → done(✅ parity) / diverged(✗ real gap) / blocked / skipped
procedure_per_factor: 1. 果仁 web: rank-ONLY on this single indicator, universe to match (or a broad universe — factor VALUES are 范围/universe-invariant), 选股日期 ≤ local calendar max.
2. 导出 → rename 果仁_{date}_{universe}_{indicator}.xlsx under Knowledge/果仁验证因子/.
3. derive/confirm the local_expr (validated rows already have it; doable rows: map the 果仁_formula → local qlib expr via guorn_local_field_mapping.md conventions).
5. record status/verdict here (re-run this script preserves it).

factors.guorn_formula: (refq(CoreProfitQ,0)-refq(CoreProfitQ,4))/abs(refq(CoreProfitQ,4))
factors.verdict: ✅ penny/display-exact (median 0.0061%, Spearman 0.994, Pearson 0.998); selection top-5/10/20 = 100%/100%/100% (no ⚠); derived expr from validated CoreProfitQ components reproduces 果仁 exactly
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-CoreProfitQGrPY.xlsx

factors.guorn_formula: 净资产收益率-RefQ(净资产收益率,1)
factors.verdict: ✗ SELECTION-DIVERGED — top-K re-test (2026-06-28, rigorous comparator): top-5/10/20 = 20%/40%/35%, Spearman 0.857, sign 60%, Pearson 0.052. Best build (TTM归母/end-eq QoQ diff). 净资产收益率 LEVEL reproducible but the diff is negative-equity-fragile (果仁 #1=000692 eq −1.29亿→333). NOT verification-complete (top-K fails the gate); book-level immaterial (1/16 weight).

factors.verdict: ✅ penny/display-exact (broad 4397, Spearman 1.000, cov 99.7%); selection overlap top-5/10/20 = 100%/100%/100% — direct field reproduces 果仁 EXACTLY at top-K

factors.guorn_formula: (业绩预告净利润Q_v1-refQ(净利润(单季),3))/abs(refQ(净利润(单季),3))
factors.verdict: ◑ top-K NOT ASSESSABLE at 2025-12-31 — only 10/4412 stocks have an active 业绩预告 at year-end (2025-annual forecasts are issued Jan 2026, mandatory by Jan-31), so the factor is inherently sparse pre-season → cov 0.2%, can't compute a meaningful top-K. VALUE was validated at rung-3 (38,252 holdings across dates, median 4.4e-05). To assess top-K, re-export at a forecast-dense date (late Jan/Feb 2026). $forecast__np_q_yoy is a sparse forecast-issuer sub-universe factor (gate on non-null).

factors.verdict: ✅ VALUE-EXACT (broad 排除ST排除科创 4412 @2025-12-31): EXACT-match 100%, Spearman/Pearson 1.000, sign 100%, top-K 100/100/100, cov 100%. 果仁 caliber = calendar days INCLUSIVE of the listing day (listed-today=1); local guorn_days_listed.py cal branch patched +1 (proven uniform +1, std=0). 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-上市天数.xlsx

factors.verdict: ✅ VERIFIED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): penny-exact + top-K 100/100/100. 果仁 真实负债资产率 = 负债合计/(资产总计−商誉−无形资产−开发支出) (剔除虚资产后的真实杠杆; 果仁 可转债系统指标 def, 财务指标--清偿能力). Local $total_liab_q0/($total_assets_q0 - $goodwill_q0 - $intan_assets_q0 - $r_and_d_q0) with NaN->0 coalesce on the 3 subtracted intangibles (banks / no-goodwill / non-capitalizing-R&D firms report NaN not 0). cov 99.9% (4408/4412), med rel-err 0.0052%, within-1% 99.9%, sign 100%, Spearman/Pearson 1.000, top-5/10/20 = 100%. lag 0. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-真实负债资产率.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-真实负债资产率.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; 真实=负债/(资产−商誉−无形−开发支出)

factors.local_expr: (Σ$total_share_q0..3)/(Σ$total_share_q4..7)-1 (AvgQ总股本4/4; 期末总股本 source)
factors.guorn_formula: AvgQ(总股本,4,0)/AvgQ(总股本,4,4)-1
factors.verdict: ◑ RANK-FAITHFUL, VALUE-DIVERGED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): top-5/10/20 = 100%/90%/85%, Spearman 0.935, but value NOT penny-exact (within-5% only 22%; median rel-err inflated by the zero-centered denominator). Structure CONFIRMED: AvgQ(总股本,4,0)/AvgQ(总股本,4,4)-1 = (Σ$total_share_q0..3)/(Σ$total_share_q4..7)-1; MANY stable-share firms match near-exactly (索通发展 -0.0790 vs -0.079027, 广东明珠, 贤丰控股, 日发精机). Divergences concentrate on MAJOR-share-change firms (中航成飞 3.53 vs 2.65, 比亚迪 1.09 vs 0.56, 步步高 0.52 vs 1.06, broker mergers 国联民生/国泰海通) => ROOT CAUSE = 总股本 SOURCE/timing: local $total_share_qN = balancesheet 期末总股本 (recognizes 增发/回购 at the report date); 果仁's AvgQ 总股本 recognizes share changes on the effective/market date -> the two diverge exactly on 增发/回购/M&A firms. A vendor/source diff, NOT a local bug (stable-share firms are exact). Rank-usable; NOT value-verified. To close: sample the daily $total_share series at the 4 quarter-end trading days (untested). 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-SharesAvgGrPY.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-SharesAvgGrPY.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; rank-faithful, value diverges on 增发/回购/M&A firms (总股本 source/timing)

factors.verdict: ✅ penny-exact + TOP-K STRONG: top-5/10/20 = 80/80/90, Spearman 1.000, Pearson 1.000, median 0.025%, cov 97.9%. 后复权 ratio (close*adj)/Ref(,250)-1, lag 0. ⚠ 2 of 果仁 top-20 unvalued locally (recent-listing no-250d-history). Window-membership residual immaterial to top-K. Broad 排除ST排除科创, single condition.

factors.guorn_formula: sumq(分红总金额,4,0)/sumq(分红总金额,4,4)-1
factors.verdict: ◑ VALUE-FAITHFUL, TOP-K FRAGILE (unstable-denom) (2026-07-01, T1 batch): domain-EXACT (3319/3321 果仁-defined prior-year payers matched; the 75% raw coverage was non-payer dilution, not a gap), Spearman 0.976, median rel-err 0.07%, and 果仁's GENUINE top matches near-exactly (恒宇信通 18.33=18.33, 大唐发电 14.61, 华林证券 9.0, 中集集团 7.0, 无线传媒 6.18 — 7/8 penny-close). Caliber CONFIRMED: DivGrPY% = declared_div_ttm(now)/declared_div_ttm(now-1yr)-1 on the 果仁 ann-date DECLARED-dividend caliber (guorn_dividend_caliber.py, per-share; 总股本 cancels in the ratio). BUT top-5 = 3/5 (< 80% gate) from a FEW recent-IPO/tiny-prev-base firms that explode: 雅艺科技(301113) my +2533% vs 果仁 +168% — the trailing-year dividend-EVENT SET differs at a near-zero base. Unstable-denominator family (same as RnDTTMGr%PY / EpsTTMGr%): value+domain faithful, selection tail fragile BY DESIGN - don't chase. The declared-dividend caliber is now validated (reusable for DivAGrPY%/DivOP%/Div%NetIncY2/连续N年分红). 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivGrPY.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivGrPY.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; value+domain exact, top-K fragile (unstable denom, tiny-prev-base IPOs); declared-div caliber validated

factors.verdict: ✅ OVERALL verified (◑ structure-exact): medRelErr 1.13%, within-5% 90.9%, Spearman/Pearson 0.998, sign 99.9%, top-K 80/100/95, cov 98.4%. CALIBER DISCOVERED: 历史贝塔 = beta vs 沪深300 (000300_SH), N=250, SIMPLE 后复权 returns (NOT 上证指数; index×window probe: 000300@250 medRelErr 1.10% vs all other combos 10-40%). beta_000300_sh_250_20251231.parquet; export col 历史贝塔 in 果仁_..._排名-贝塔N日+历史贝塔.xlsx

factors.verdict: ✅ REPRODUCED via caliber (my earlier 'irreducible' verdict was WRONG). 果仁 股息率TTM = Σ declared cash div (税前 cash_div_tax, most-finalized amount, ANN-date 预案 TTM window, PIT ann≤signal) / raw close. Validated 2025-12-31: median 0.52% rel (isolated on 果仁 price), top-5/10 100%, Spearman 0.992; on local close top-5 100%/top-20 90%. $dv_ttm (ex-date REALIZED) matches the BULK (0.70% med) but diverges at the high-yield TAIL/selection: counts announced-not-yet-ex (600329 2.450) + drops old-announcement-ex'd (603167 0.220). Helper: guorn_dividend_caliber.py.

Two PROVEN causes (not a bug): (1) 果仁 交易天数 = actual traded-bar count, suspension-EXCLUDED — 果仁==provider $close bar count EXACTLY 4/4 high-diff names (300278=2833,300071=3247,002239=3753,002252=3766); local counts market-CALENDAR trading days so local≥果仁. (2) 2008 data-start cap (trade_cal+day.txt both begin 2008-01-02): 1299 pre-2008 names pinned local=4376 vs 果仁 4400-8453 → oldest-name top-K unrecoverable. factors.local_expr: annual(分红,0&1&2)>0 = paid FY2024&2023&2022 (declared_dividend_by_fy + list_year<=2022 gate); count-type
factors.guorn_formula:
min(股息率,250*{0})>0
[模板参数] 参数名: 连续N年  默认值: 3,-1,-1
factors.verdict: ◑ COUNT-APPROX (2026-07-01, T1 batch): 94.3% exact-match (100% coverage) with the discrete caliber annual(分红,0/1/2)>0 = a dividend paid in EACH of FY2024/2023/2022 (per-FY declared_dividend_by_fy, PIT ann<=signal) + a list_year<=2022 gate. I OVER-mark ~250 (my 2413 =1 vs 果仁 2164). RULED OUT two decodes: (a) the tracker's min(股息率,750td)>0 continuous-yield variant is TOO STRICT (annual-announcement drift creates brief trailing-yield 0-gaps -> only 421 =1, 60% match) so it is NOT 果仁's def; (b) annual-only end_date=1231 is worse (92.8%). Residual ~5.7% = a subtler annual-dividend-existence rule (late-FY2024 announcers / young-firm annual-offset) not fully pinned. Boolean FILTER (top-K degenerate/irrelevant); usable with caveat; spot-check the ~250 if load-bearing. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-连续3年分红.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-连续3年分红.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; 94.3% count-approx; ruled out min(股息率,750) & annual-only; residual = subtle annual-existence rule

factors.verdict: 🔴 BLOCKED — 720d stdev of DAILY 分红总金额; dividends aren't daily, non-reproducible construction.

factors.local_expr: (declared_div_ttm x $total_share)/Sum($operate_profit_sq_q0..3) (分红总金额=total / TTM营业利润)
factors.guorn_formula: sumq(分红总金额,4)/TTM(营业利润,0)
factors.verdict: ◑ VALUE-FAITHFUL, TOP-K FRAGILE (2026-07-01, T1 batch): shared payer domain (n=3140) Spearman 0.985, median rel-err 0.031%, within-5% 88%, sign 99.9%; 果仁's top-6 match to 4 decimals (皖通科技 56.11=56.11, 金明精机 32.66, 万东医疗 31.04, 安达维尔 29.61, 红墙股份 28.26; 好想你 17170 explosive both sides). Caliber CONFIRMED: DivOP% = 分红总金额TTM/TTM营业利润 = (declared_div_ttm x 总股本)/Sum($operate_profit_sq_q0..3). 分红总金额 = TOTAL (元): the x总股本 gives sane payout ratios (茅台 0.52, 格力 0.61, 工行 0.25); $total_share is in shares. BUT top-5 = 2/5 (< gate): the 营业利润 denominator goes near-zero for marginal firms -> explosive top (好想你 17170) -> outlier ORDER hypersensitive; plus ~12% firm-level residual (建发股份 0.24 vs 0.10 = 营业利润 caliber nuance, spot-check if load-bearing). Unstable-denominator family (like DivGrPY%/RnDTTMGr%): value+caliber faithful, selection tail fragile - don't chase. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivOP.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivOP.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; value+caliber faithful (Spearman 0.985), top-K fragile (营业利润 denom instability); confirms 分红总金额=total

factors.verdict: 🔴 BLOCKED(comparator) — consensus expected-earnings growth = $report_rc__np_fy1 / actual-base − 1; vendor-approx (Tushare 卖方研报 ≠ 朝阳永续, cf 评级机构数) + needs an actual-NP base join; not a clean single $-field comparison.

factors.verdict: ◑ VALUE penny-exact (depth-9; Spearman 0.98, med relerr 0.015%) but TOP-K DIVERGED 40/60/65 — year-ago R&D coverage gap (annual-only reporters, 7/20 top NaN local); 4 caliber variants (raw/symmetric/floor/NaN-tol) tried, NONE close it → unstable-denom family; 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-RnDTTMGrPY.xlsx

factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-RoeQ.xlsx

factors.local_expr: mean[(declared_div_FY x 总股本)/n_income_attr_p_cum_(q3 FY24/q7 FY23)] 2yr, ifnull->FY24
factors.guorn_formula: ifnull((Annual(分红总金额,0)/Annual(净利润(单季),0)+Annual(分红总金额,1)/Annual(净利润(单季),1))/2,Annual(分红总金额,0)/Annual(净利润(单季),0))
factors.verdict: ◑ VALUE-FAITHFUL (normal band) / TOP-K & tail DIVERGED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): normal payout ratios match (坤泰 0.3001=0.3001, 华泰 0.30, 建行 0.30, 酒鬼酒 8.10=8.10) but WEAKEST of the dividend family: Spearman 0.877, median rel-err 7.0%, within-5% 46%, top-5 1/5. Caliber = 2yr-avg payout mean[(分红总金额FY/净利润FY) FY2024,FY2023], ifnull->FY2024; 分红总金额=declared x 总股本, FY净利润=n_income_attr_p_cum_q3(FY2024)/_q7(FY2023). TWO divergence sources: (1) net-income DENOMINATOR instability - near-zero/negative FY NI explodes/sign-flips (北陆药业 45.95 vs 2.06, 溢多利 13.2 vs -0.58); (2) per-FY-NI cum-offset mapping (cum_q3/q7) fragile for irregular-reporting firms. Unstable-denominator family, weakest member - value-faithful only in the normal 0.1-1 payout band. Don't chase. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivNetIncY2.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivNetIncY2.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; normal-band faithful, weakest member (NI denom instability + FY-NI offset fragility)

factors.guorn_formula: (annual(分红总金额,0)-annual(分红总金额,1))/annual(分红总金额,1)
factors.verdict: ◑ VALUE-FAITHFUL, TOP-K marginal (2026-07-01, T1 batch): domain-exact (intersection 3229/3229), Spearman 0.979, median rel-err 0.069%, sign 90%; 果仁's top near-exact (雅艺科技 22.33=22.33, 国机汽车 20.0, 迪安诊断 13.81, 华致酒行 10.16, 正强股份 9.2). top-5/10/20 = 4/5, 8/10, 15/20 (top-5/10 >=80%, top-20 75%). One explosive miss 正丹股份 34.0 vs 54.0 (tiny FY2023 base). Caliber = (annual分红FY2024 - FY2023)/FY2023 on the declared per-share caliber. Same unstable-denominator family as DivGrPY% (value/caliber faithful, selection tail fragile) - milder. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivAGrPY.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivAGrPY.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; value+domain exact, top-K marginal (unstable denom); same family as DivGrPY%

factors.guorn_formula: (ref(每股收益,0)-ref(每股收益,4))/abs(ref(每股收益,4))-1
factors.verdict: ✗ NOT reproduced — ROOT CAUSE = 果仁-side formula bug (2026-07-01, help-doc-confirmed + empirically verified; supersedes the earlier vague "unstable-denominator" note). 果仁 自定义函数列表 §二: ref(x,N) steps by TRADING DAY (not report-quarter), and ref(x,0) returns the DATA-START first-day value (上市第一天; 2007-01-04 for pre-2007 stocks) — NOT today. So EpsTTMGr% = (ref(每股收益,0)−ref(每股收益,4))/abs(ref(每股收益,4))−1 evaluates to (每股收益@2007-01-04 − 每股收益@4-trading-days-ago)/|now| − 1: a ~19-yr EPS level-change plus an erroneous trailing −1, NOT a TTM-YoY. (果仁 own canonical growth caliber = (TTM(x,0)−TTM(x,4))/abs(TTM(x,4)), 财务指标公式 line 65; 每股收益 itself = TTM(归母净利润,0)/总股本, line 75.) CONFIRMED by inverting 果仁 EpsTTMGr%+每股收益 → implied ref(每股收益,0): 茅台1.44/万科0.42/格力0.73/恒瑞0.57/工行0.11 (all match 2006-era EPS; universe median 0.58≈2007 levels; ratio X0/X4 dispersed −98..+172 = ancient/current, not YoY≈1). The 每股收益 FIELD reproduces cleanly (Spearman 0.9975); the composite is irreproducible because its target is a mis-written-formula artifact, not an economic factor — nothing to chase. export col EpsTTMGr% in 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
factors.note: 果仁 ref(x,0)=first-data-day(2007-01-04) gotcha; formula bug, not a caliber gap

Exact sortino top-K needs the web template-N export (friction) for a 1-book factor; returns-construction confirmed reproducible. lag-0.

factors.guorn_formula:
ATR({0})/后复权收盘价
[模板参数] 参数名: N  默认值: 50,-1,-1
factors.verdict: ◑ rank-faithful, precision-capped by 果仁's 2-decimal export: within-0.01 (one rounding unit) 99.9%, Spearman 0.966, sign 100%, cov 99.5%. 果仁 factor = custom ATRN, formula ATR(N)/后复权收盘价 (edit-dialog confirmed); verified at N=50 (ATRN(50)) → transfers to the book's N=20 (identical formula). Value-exact/top-K NOT assessable: 果仁 exports 2dp only → 12 distinct values over 4412 → top-5 tie at 0.13. Caliber = simple-MA TrueRange/close (raw≈后复权; NOT Wilder — Wilder scored worse, Spearman 0.881). NOT a local bug. export col ATRN(50) in 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
